pages.text: Tool Steel/Martensitic/Edge Retention: physical tool and weapon reliability. Aeroelastic/Electroductile: speed, bows, and handling. Matrix/Resonance/Radiant: enchantment, magic, and precision.
Reactor/MOX/Gamma/Neutron: heavy dangerous reactor materials. Elastomeric/Polymer/Shape Memory: grips, linings, bindings, and recovery. Cascade/Boss/Terminus: staged late-game alloy families.
